templates.name: Welcome from Cabin Rentals of Georgia
templates.message_text:
Dear [FirstName],

Thank you for choosing Cabin Rentals of Georgia! It is our pleasure to help with any questions you may have prior to your arrival and to make sure your arrival is seamless.

To help you pack and plan, here are a few important details to review before your stay at [PropertyId]:

📍 Arrival Info & Area Guide: Approximately two weeks prior to your arrival date, you will receive an email to view your Property Guide which will provide the address, turn-by-turn directions, etc.

Also, you may use GPS to arrive in the town of Blue Ridge, but after that, please make sure to follow our turn-by-turn directions. 

Start planning your fun right now! Here is our Area Guide featuring our favorite restaurants, activities, and exclusive discounts to some of our favorite small businesses: [DestinationGuideLink]

🧳 What’s Included & What to Pack: Your luxury cabin rental is stocked to get you started!

* Kitchen: Pots, pans, dishes, coffee maker, dish soap, dishwasher pods, trash bags, and paper towels.
* Bed & Bath: Linens, towels, laundry detergent, toilet paper, and travel-sized shampoo/body wash.
* Grilling: Propane (tank or gas line) is provided.
* Tip: If you ordered firewood, we recommend picking up a "fire starter log" at the grocery store for easy lighting!

⏰ Early Check-In / Late Check-Out Requests: We love offering extra time to our guests! Our early check-in/late check-out service is $50 per hour for up 2 hours, excluding tax + processing. Please let us know if you would like to add this and we would be happy to review that for you.

However, should a turn-around clean occur on the day of your arrival or departure, we will have to refund this service if previously purchased. We apologize in advance should this occur, but our team requires the full time from 10am to 3:30pm to thoroughly clean a property according to our standards. Thank you for understanding!

🛡️ Travel Insurance: Life happens! If you haven't already, we recommend Travelex to cover unforeseen events (sickness, weather, etc.) and ensure your peace of mind.

* Visit: www.travelexinsurance.com
* Reference Number: 10-0454

We look forward to welcoming you! See you soon!

Best Regards, 

Taylor Knight
Blue Ridge Vacation Specialist
taylor.knight@cabin-rentals-of-georgia.com
https://linktr.ee/crgluxury
Office  (706) 432-2140
86 Huntington Way
Blue Ridge, Georgia 30513

Your trip is just around the corner! To ensure a smooth arrival, we have prepared two digital guides for you. Please bookmark these links on your phone, as they contain everything you need for your Blue Ridge experience.

templates.message_text:
Hi [FirstName] ~

Just a reminder about the gas fireplaces in this cabin:

All pilot lights have been lit prior to your arrival. Just turn ON

If the pilot light goes out, it is your responsibility to re-light it. Just follow the easy how-to instructions on the video provided in your House Guestbook under tab About our Home > Gas Fireplaces. Or click this link: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SVZpmGoS55s

Please do not leave the fireplace on while unattended, and especially overnight as this creates a health hazard.

*Please do not cook s'mores in the gas fireplaces as this damages the gas logs.*

Thank you so much for cooperating with us! We hope you have a great time.

The CROG Team
